rows.label: qev092801_MSG0010
rows.name: Hey, Liesel here. Been a while, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092801_MSG0020
rows.name:
If you've got the time, could
you head over to meet me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092801_MSG0030
rows.name:
I, uh...I might need a little
help. It's about Hraesvelg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092801_MSG0040
rows.name:
Alicia's waiting for you
too. We'll see you soon.[ST:wait ]
